violations.text: Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on low boy units #1 and #2. Refrigerator door gaskets shall be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 09/28/2025

Various food items were observed held at 45 degrees Fahrenheit with the right-side sandwich prep unit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Food items in unit were held for less than 4 hours within unit and were moved to different refrigeration at time of inspection. PIC indicated that service had been called for unit. TCS foods are not to be stored in unit until an ambient temperature of 41 degrees Fahrenheit can be maintained. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/26/2024
